document.title: Life Cycle Report For Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector HAD1717MC, HAD1717MG

sourceSummary.oneLine: Life cycle report for HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG digital flat panel X-ray detectors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports product life cycle justification using the AC-DC Power Converter RPS-200-12 capacitor life cycle basis and stated frequency of use.
keyPoints: The document covers the life cycle of HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC.
The part key identified is the AC-DC Power Converter RPS-200-12 from MEANWELL.
The basis is a MEANWELL capacitor life cycle test report for RPS-200-12.
The stated result is 11348.7 hours and estimated service life is about 5 years.
